title: `Executing XAIGER backend` cannot terminate until out-of-memory.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.50+49 (git sha1 05c81b3f1, clang++ 14.0.0-1ubuntu1.1 -Og -fPIC -O1 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-optimize-sibling-calls -fsanitize=address,undefined)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

The following is the Verilog code file `bug.v` that causes the bug. I have minimized it as much as possible:

```verilog
module a (
    input  [2:7] b,
    input  [2:7] c,
    output [2:7] d
);
    reg [2:7] e;

    always @(*) begin
        case (e ? b << e : 0)
            'd67: begin
                e = c;
                d = e;
            end
        endcase
    end
endmodule
```
Running the following script will trigger the bug.
```
yosys -p "read_verilog bug.v; synth_quicklogic"
```
I discovered this bug while testing Yosys using a fuzzing tool I am developing.

### Expected Behavior

In the end, it should either synthesize successfully or fail with an error, but it should not result in an out-of-memory error.

### Actual Behavior

Memory usage keeps increasing after reaching the step `Executing XAIGER backend`, until the `yosys` process is killed by the system due to an OOM (Out Of Memory) condition.
Here is the log generated at the end:
```
2.40.14.1. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

2.40.14.2. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

2.40.14.3. Executing XAIGER backend.


^C
```
I used GDB for debugging and found that the final call stack of Yosys is as follows. I suspect that an infinite recursion might have occurred.
```
#0  0x000055555731e7f8 in std::vector<int, std::allocator<int> >::empty() const ()
#1  0x00005555574ae854 in Yosys::hashlib::dict<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, int, Yosys::hashlib::hash_ops<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::do_hash(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const&) const ()
#2  0x00005555574454e9 in Yosys::hashlib::dict<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, int, Yosys::hashlib::hash_ops<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::find(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const&) ()
#3  0x0000555558dd8ae0 in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#4  0x0000555558dd8cc6 in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#5  0x0000555558dd8c1f in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#6  0x0000555558dd8c1f in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#7  0x0000555558dd8cc6 in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#8  0x0000555558dd8c1f in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#9  0x0000555558dd8c1f in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
```
repeat.........
code_blocks:
2.40.14.1. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

2.40.14.2. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

2.40.14.3. Executing XAIGER backend.


^C
